product.one_sentence_description: Launchframe creates auditable launch workspaces for OSS developer-tool launches.
product.launch_scope: Public beta of the CLI scaffold, validator, templates, dogfood site, and npm package.
product.project_mechanism: A Node CLI copies launch workspace templates, validates required launch context, and generates evidence report scaffolds.
product.primary_user: OSS developer-tool maintainers preparing HN, Reddit, package, repo, site, and launch-day materials.
product.core_falsifiable_claim: A clean public npx install can create and validate a Launchframe workspace.
product.monetization_summary: Free OSS CLI with optional startup pilot and custom enterprise support; no payment collection in the public beta flow.

free_oss.summary: The CLI and templates are open source under Apache-2.0.

startup_pilot.summary: Optional guided launch support for early teams.
startup_pilot.payment_timing: No payment collected until fit is confirmed.

enterprise.summary: Custom launch process support for teams with security, procurement, or multi-product needs.

claim_risk_profile.claim_downgrade_notes: Do not claim automated launch success, truth verification, security compliance, or production readiness.

credential_paths.notes: Use a temporary npmrc for publish commands.

claim_boundaries.automatic_downgrade_rule: If evidence is missing, weaken the claim or mark it blocked instead of asking piecemeal.

distribution_surfaces.name: launchframe-cli
distribution_surfaces.verification_command: npx --yes launchframe-cli@latest init workspace && npx --yes launchframe-cli@latest validate workspace --template
distribution_surfaces.expected_result: Workspace is created and template validation passes from a clean temp directory.

distribution_surfaces.name: launchframe.site
distribution_surfaces.verification_command: GitHub Pages workflow and browser/URL check
distribution_surfaces.expected_result: Launchframe site and Startup Pilot page are live over HTTPS.

distribution_surfaces.name: Launchframe trust and policy docs
distribution_surfaces.verification_command: rg source inspection plus docs review
distribution_surfaces.expected_result: No CLI telemetry/network behavior is found and policy docs avoid unsupported hosted-service claims.

claim_risk.automatic_rule: High-risk claims require evidence or explicit owner approval; otherwise weaken or remove.

policy_docs.data_retention_summary: The CLI stores only local workspace files. The Startup Pilot form stores submitted email/source data in Tally.

verification.core_falsifiable_demo: Clean npx scaffold and validation pass.
verification.demo_command: npx --yes launchframe-cli@latest init workspace && npx --yes launchframe-cli@latest validate workspace --template
verification.expected_failure: Normal validation fails until a generated workspace is filled with real launch facts and evidence.
verification.expected_pass: Template validation passes on a freshly generated scaffold.

known_limitations: Validation is structural and evidence-oriented; it does not prove every public claim is true.
Show HN posting waits on human account suitability.
hard_constraints: No vote solicitation, comment automation, or bot-like public posting.
